problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to to, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
